subcodes.first_line: O My leaf! Upon thee be the salutations of God, His mercy and His loving-kindness. A Cause that hath precedence over all things and a cause that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی علیک سلام الله و رحمته و عنایته امریکه بر جمیع اشیا مقدم و سببیکه
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @soul; spirit after death, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
